metadata.title: London Route Transfers - Professional Passenger Transport in London
metadata.description: Airport transfers, corporate transport, group and private travel in London. Reliable service with professional drivers.

airport.title: Airport Transfers
airport.desc: Meet & greet, flight tracking, luggage assistance.

corporate.title: Corporate Travel
corporate.desc: Transport for employees, clients and corporate events.

group.title: Group Transport
group.desc: Schools, tourists, corporate groups of any size.

private.title: Private Journeys
private.desc: Premium and business class vehicles on demand.

about.title: Reliable operator
about.text1: London Route Transfers organises passenger transport in London and beyond. We work with private clients, companies and groups.
about.text2: Every journey is managed as a controlled process — from receiving the request to completing the route.

cta.title: Request a callback — we will contact you to clarify the details

booking.title: Book a Transfer
booking.subtitle: Fill out the form and we will contact you to confirm your trip

form.consent: I consent to the processing of personal data in accordance with the Privacy Policy
form.footerNote: We process personal data only for handling requests and organizing transport

success.title: Request accepted!
success.text: We will contact you during business hours to clarify the details of your trip.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passengers: Number of passengers must be at least 1
validation.consent: You must consent to data processing

manager.title: Manager Dashboard
manager.subtitle: Booking Management System
manager.demoNote: Demo data • Form submissions are not saved to this list

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.text1: London Route Transfers collects personal information submitted through booking forms solely for the purpose of arranging transport services and communicating with customers.
privacy.text2: We do not sell personal information and only share data where necessary to provide requested services.
privacy.text3: For any privacy-related inquiries, please contact us at booking@example.test.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.text1: This website may use cookies to improve functionality, security and user experience.
cookies.text2: By continuing to use the website you consent to the use of cookies.
cookies.text3: You can disable cookies in your browser settings at any time.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.text1: By using this website, you agree to these Terms of Use.
terms.text2: All information provided on this website is for informational purposes only.
terms.text3: London Route Transfers reserves the right to modify these terms at any time.
